_comment: Phase-53 ESLINT-RATCHET-1 shrink-only baseline. The two propmanager-scoped rules (no-hardcoded-english-strings + no-ltr-class) are now severity=error in eslint.config.js. The watchdog (scripts/lint-baseline.mjs) runs ESLint, counts violations per rule, and exits non-zero if any current count exceeds its baseline below. Lower a value here ONLY after fixing real violations; never raise.

phase-53.rationale: Phase 44 codemod cleared bulk LTR-class residue (906 → 0). Hardcoded-English bulk remains in Vue templates; the baseline captures the residual + ratchets downward as Phase-43 + Phase-44 + Phase-52 i18n backfill commits land. Severity stays at warn so `npm run lint` is dev-workflow-friendly; the contract is enforced by `npm run lint:baseline` in CI — new violations grow the count past the baseline and fail the gate.
